queue_item.action: Require cryptographically bound signing time within certificate validity before evidence promotion.

progress.finding: Transparency-log verification alone does not establish a trustworthy signing time. Bare Rekor v1 integratedTime is mutable without detection unless bound by a verified signed entry timestamp; RFC3161 and Rekor v2 time require trusted timestamp verification.
progress.verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files.
progress.trust_limit: The classifier does not verify timestamp signatures, SET signatures, TSA roots, certificate chains, revocation, or claim truth; it consumes explicit results from an external cryptographic verifier.

queue_item.handoff: Vercel and Cloudflare evidence promotion should require both the R-005 DSSE/transparency decision and this signing-time decision. Reject bare integratedTime and any trusted time outside certificate validity.

preservation_rule: Do not overwrite operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json, other teams' queue updates, or Git history.
